overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a post-apocalyptic landscape. The character moves from a red-corrupted open area with alien vegetation through a misty forest with Spanish moss, ending at ancient wooden ruins. The environment transitions from vivid red corrupted ground to lush green forest with atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: corrupted clearing with alien red vegetation and ancient machinery

events.description: character transitions from standing to walking toward the green container
character passes close by the large green supply crate, temporarily blocking right side of view

agents.ego_description: character stands near a smoking stone pillar then walks steadily toward a large green container surrounded by red corrupted vegetation

entered.detail: ancient stone structure emitting white smoke with carved patterns
large dead tree wrapped in thick red alien tendrils and corruption
large bright green futuristic container with black accents and metallic latches
ground covered in vibrant red alien moss and tendrils

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide corrupted clearing with vivid red alien vegetation covering the ground. The character stands near a smoking stone pillar before walking toward a large green supply crate. The sky is partly cloudy and the area is open with dead trees wrapped in red tendrils visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition path between corrupted zone and forest edge

events.description: leaving the open corrupted clearing and entering the tree-lined path
red corruption on ground begins thinning as green vegetation appears on sides

agents.ego_description: character walks along a winding dirt path away from the container, moving toward denser tree cover

entered.detail: dense line of trees marking the entrance to the forest ahead
rock outcrops and boulders lining the sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves along a dirt trail away from the corrupted clearing, passing into a transitional zone where trees begin to line the path. The green supply crate and smoke pillar fall behind as the forest tree line ahead becomes more prominent. The red corruption on the ground gradually gives way to natural earth and rocks.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty forest with spanish moss and dense undergrowth

events.description: entering the forest canopy causes light to become more diffused and dappled
ground cover transitions from red corruption to green ferns and moss

agents.ego_description: character walks through increasingly dense forest with hanging spanish moss and misty atmosphere

entered.detail: tall trees draped with hanging gray-green spanish moss
low-lying fog and mist between the tree trunks in the distance
thick green ferns and undergrowth covering the forest floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dense forest environment where spanish moss hangs from the trees and mist gathers between the trunks. The lighting shifts to a diffused green-tinted glow as the canopy closes overhead. The red corrupted vegetation disappears completely, replaced by lush green ferns and moss-covered ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep forest interior with ancient wooden ruins

events.description: approaching and entering the area with broken wooden structures and ruins

agents.ego_description: character navigates through thick tree trunks and dense vegetation toward ancient wooden ruins

entered.detail: ancient broken wooden structures and debris from old buildings
large thick tree trunks covered in thick green moss and lichen
exposed gnarled roots of large trees crossing the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the forest where the trees become larger and the canopy blocks most of the sky. Ancient wooden ruins and broken structures appear ahead among the trees. The path narrows and becomes more enclosed by moss-covered tree trunks and twisted roots, creating a mysterious atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vivid, corrupted wasteland into the depths of a mysterious, overgrown forest. It begins in a wide clearing dominated by red alien vegetation and a smoking stone pillar, following the character as they move past a green supply crate toward a distant tree line. As the character follows a dirt trail, the red corruption on the ground gradually gives way to natural earth and rocks, transitioning the open landscape into a wooded corridor. The scene then shifts into a dense forest where the lighting becomes a diffused green glow, with Spanish moss hanging from the canopy and mist gathering among lush ferns. Finally, the path narrows through twisted roots and massive trunks, leading the camera deeper into the enclosure toward ancient wooden ruins and broken structures.
